items.name: Thunder Mage Quarterstaff, +3

passive_effects.summary: +3 to attack and damage rolls made with this quarterstaff.
Resistance to thunder damage while attuned.

granted_spells.name: Thunderwave
granted_spells.description: TODO: Verify spell ID 'thunderwave' matches the spell compendium entry. Expend 1 charge to cast thunderwave (CON save DC 17). 15-ft cube of thunder force.

granted_spells.name: Shatter
granted_spells.description: TODO: Verify spell ID 'shatter' matches the spell compendium entry. Expend 2 charges to cast shatter (CON save DC 17). 10-ft sphere of thunder damage.

granted_spells.name: Call Lightning
granted_spells.description: TODO: Verify spell ID 'call-lightning' matches the spell compendium entry. Expend 3 charges to call lightning (DEX save DC 17). Summon storm cloud dealing 3d10 lightning.

granted_spells.name: Lightning Bolt
granted_spells.description: TODO: Verify spell ID 'lightning-bolt' matches the spell compendium entry. Expend 3 charges to cast lightning bolt (DEX save DC 17). 100-ft line of lightning dealing 8d6.

granted_spells.name: Thunder Step
granted_spells.description: TODO: Verify spell ID 'thunder-step' matches the spell compendium entry. Expend 3 charges to cast thunder step (CON save DC 17). Teleport up to 90 ft, deal 3d10 thunder to creatures left behind.

items.notes: TODO: The Thunder Mage Quarterstaff spell list is a placeholder. Confirm with the DM or game notes which spells are actually granted, their charge costs, and whether the item uses the wielder's spell attack bonus/save DC instead of the item's stats.
items.flavor_text: A gnarled quarterstaff wrapped in crackling silver wire. When held, faint rumbles of distant thunder echo in the wielder's mind.
items.effect: A +3 quarterstaff for a thunder mage. Has 10 charges. Resistance to thunder damage. Can cast thunderwave (1 charge), shatter (2 charges), call lightning (3 charges), lightning bolt (3 charges), or thunder step (3 charges) — all with save DC 17. Regains 1d6+4 charges at dawn. TODO: Verify full spell list.
